examples: In fact, the activity in their insula actually declines.
The primary function attributed to the insula is disgust, not love.
One area that did not change is the insula, which is associated with self-awareness.
The study builds on previous research which has shown the insula is involved in the onset of mood disorders.
It includes the amygdala, hippocampus, cingulated gyrus, orbital frontal cortex, and the insula.
